recommendations.decision_reason: Better suited to quarter/semi qualification than outright winner.
Potentially live in qualification-stage futures if draw path supports it.
Model already likes Japan in match market; futures price is worth monitoring, not automatic staking.
Strong underdog profile; outright price is long but quarter-final path price may be more usable.
Tournament profile is stronger than outright price implies, but age/squad risk must be checked.
Long-shot quality profile; requires squad/news validation before staking.
Group K price is competitive behind Portugal; watch with group-path analysis.
Match-market model already upgrades Japan; Group F winner price is a path-sensitive watch.
Group L winner price reflects England premium; useful monitoring candidate.
Group C price depends on Brazil result; better treated as watch until group-path model is integrated.
Group D has host-region dynamics and wide pricing; monitor rather than stake.
Group I winner is hard with France/Norway, but price is worth tracking.
Market implies a high chance Australia fails to win a group match; plausible in Group D, but downside price is too short without simulation edge.

source_logs.name: FIFA/Coca-Cola men's world ranking
source_logs.usage: team-strength baseline and official ranking-change monitor

raw.name: FIFA/Coca-Cola men's world ranking
raw.usage: team-strength baseline and official ranking-change monitor

source_logs.name: Hicruben/world-cup-2026-prediction-model
source_logs.usage: 用于48队强弱先验、低比分修正和比赛结果概率交叉验证；其walk-forward/backtest思路进入本地模型审计，Monte Carlo路径作为晋级/淘汰赛模拟接口。

raw.name: Hicruben/world-cup-2026-prediction-model
github_evidence: 公开 README 描述为 Elo ratings -> Dixon-Coles bivariate Poisson -> Monte Carlo simulation。
README 提到 48-team、10,000-simulation、groups -> Round of 32 -> final 的完整赛事路径。
README 提供 backtest.mjs、calibrate.mjs、predict.mjs 和 walk-forward out-of-sample 评价。
reusable_features: 48队赛事路径 Monte Carlo 接口
walk-forward 回测摘要
CLI 预测与校准脚本分层
透明模型说明和非自动下注免责声明
layout_patterns: 方法论、回测指标、示例预测分块展示
用进度条/百分比呈现三结果概率
把 live prediction、methodology、bracket simulator 分为独立入口

source_logs.name: RyanSCodes/Dixon-Coles-Football-Predictor
source_logs.usage: 作为后续回测/时间衰减权重设计参考；当前不复制其Python 2.7实现。

raw.name: RyanSCodes/Dixon-Coles-Football-Predictor
github_evidence: 公开 README 标注 Python 2.7，并说明基于 Dixon-Coles method。
README 描述主场优势、每队攻防参数和 Poisson 进球分布。
README 说明历史结果按时间指数衰减，旧结果对当前状态影响更低。
reusable_features: 指数时间衰减思路
主场优势参数
攻防参数拆分
比分矩阵汇总成胜平负概率
layout_patterns: 把时间衰减列为模型风险说明，不直接复制旧实现
用攻防参数解释模型分歧来源
把 legacy runtime/license 风险作为人工复核提示
raw.report_usage: 作为后续回测/时间衰减权重设计参考；当前不复制其Python 2.7实现。
